query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3CoverUrl IS NOT NULL AND s3CoverUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_s3,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND coverImageUrl != '' AND coverImageUrl != 'not-found' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_cover
FROM book_profiles;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3CoverUrl IS NOT NULL AND s3CoverUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_s3,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND coverImageUrl != '' AND coverImageUrl != 'not-found' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_cover
FROM book_profiles;
